mapper.update: update purchase_order set status = #{toStatus}, approved_by = case when #{toStatus} = 'APPROVED' then #{operator} else null end, approved_time = case when #{toStatus} = 'APPROVED' then now() else null end, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = #{fromStatus}

update purchase_receipt set status = #{toStatus}, approved_by = case when #{toStatus} = 'APPROVED' then #{operator} else null end, approved_time = case when #{toStatus} = 'APPROVED' then now() else null end, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = #{fromStatus}

update purchase_inbound set status = #{toStatus}, approved_by = case when #{toStatus} = 'APPROVED' then #{operator} else null end, approved_time = case when #{toStatus} = 'APPROVED' then now() else null end, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.select: select count(1) from purchase_receipt_line rl inner join purchase_receipt r on r.id = rl.receipt_id where rl.source_order_id = #{orderId} and r.status = 'APPROVED'
select count(1) from purchase_inbound_line il inner join purchase_inbound i on i.id = il.inbound_id where il.source_receipt_id = #{receiptId} and i.status = 'APPROVED'

select count(distinct concat(ifnull(po.supplier_code, ''), '|', ifnull(po.supplier_name, ''))) from purchase_receipt_line rl inner join purchase_order po on po.id = rl.source_order_id where rl.receipt_id = #{receiptId}

select count(1) from purchase_receipt_line rl inner join purchase_receipt r on r.id = rl.receipt_id inner join purchase_order po on po.id = rl.source_order_id where rl.receipt_id = #{receiptId} and (ifnull(r.supplier_code, '') != ifnull(po.supplier_code, '') or ifnull(r.supplier_name, '') != ifnull(po.supplier_name, ''))

select count(1) from purchase_inbound_line il inner join purchase_inbound i on i.id = il.inbound_id where il.inbound_id = #{inboundId} and ifnull(i.warehouse_code, '') != ifnull(il.warehouse_code, '')
mapper.update: update purchase_receipt_line set qualified_quantity = 0, rejected_quantity = 0, pending_quantity = received_quantity where receipt_id = #{receiptId}

update purchase_receipt_line set qualified_quantity = #{line.qualifiedQuantity}, rejected_quantity = #{line.rejectedQuantity}, pending_quantity = #{line.pendingQuantity}, update_by = #{line.updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{line.id}
update purchase_receipt set inspection_status = #{status}, inspection_by = #{operator}, inspection_time = now(), update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{receiptId}
mapper.insert: insert into inventory_balance(material_id, material_code, material_name, warehouse_code, location_code, lot_no, unit, quantity, available_quantity, locked_quantity, status, last_inbound_date, last_update_time, create_by, create_time) values (#{transaction.materialId}, #{transaction.materialCode}, #{transaction.materialName}, #{transaction.warehouseCode}, #{transaction.locationCode}, #{transaction.lotNo}, #{transaction.unit}, #{transaction.quantity}, #{transaction.quantity}, 0, 'NORMAL', curdate(), now(), #{transaction.createBy}, now()) on duplicate key update quantity = quantity + values(quantity), available_quantity = available_quantity + values(available_quantity), last_inbound_date = curdate(), last_update_time = now(), update_by = values(create_by), update_time = now()

insert into inventory_transaction(transaction_type, business_id, business_code, business_line_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, warehouse_code, location_code, lot_no, unit, quantity, source_receipt_line_id, source_order_line_id, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{transactionType}, #{businessId}, #{businessCode}, #{businessLineId}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{warehouseCode}, #{locationCode}, #{lotNo}, #{unit}, #{quantity}, #{sourceReceiptLineId}, #{sourceOrderLineId}, #{createBy}, now(), #{remark})
mapper.select:
select po.id as sourceOrderId, po.order_code as sourceOrderCode, pol.id as sourceOrderLineId, pol.line_no as sourceOrderLineNo, po.supplier_code as supplierCode, po.supplier_name as supplierName, pol.material_id as materialId, pol.material_code as materialCode, pol.material_name as materialName, pol.spec as spec, pol.unit as unit, pol.order_quantity as orderQuantity, pol.received_quantity as receivedQuantity, pol.order_quantity - pol.received_quantity as remainingQuantity from purchase_order po inner join purchase_order_line pol on pol.order_id = po.id where po.status = 'APPROVED' and pol.order_quantity > pol.received_quantity
and po.order_code like concat('%', #{orderCode}, '%')
and po.supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
and pol.material_code like concat('%', #{materialCode}, '%')
order by po.id desc, pol.line_no

select r.id as sourceReceiptId, r.receipt_code as sourceReceiptCode, rl.id as sourceReceiptLineId, rl.line_no as sourceReceiptLineNo, rl.source_order_id as sourceOrderId, rl.source_order_code as sourceOrderCode, rl.source_order_line_id as sourceOrderLineId, rl.source_order_line_no as sourceOrderLineNo, rl.material_id as materialId, rl.material_code as materialCode, rl.material_name as materialName, rl.spec as spec, rl.unit as unit, rl.warehouse_code as warehouseCode, rl.warehouse_name as warehouseName, rl.location_code as locationCode, rl.location_name as locationName, rl.lot_no as lotNo, rl.qualified_quantity as qualifiedQuantity, rl.inbound_quantity as inboundQuantity, rl.qualified_quantity - rl.inbound_quantity as remainingQuantity from purchase_receipt r inner join purchase_receipt_line rl on rl.receipt_id = r.id where r.status = 'APPROVED' and r.inspection_status in ('PASSED', 'PARTIAL') and rl.pending_quantity = 0 and rl.qualified_quantity > rl.inbound_quantity
and r.receipt_code like concat('%', #{receiptCode}, '%')
and rl.warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}
and rl.material_code like concat('%', #{materialCode}, '%')
order by r.id desc, rl.line_no
